title: AstraZeneca joins obesity biotech SixPeaks at basecamp with $80M for buyout option
summary: AstraZeneca committed $80 million to SixPeaks Bio, a Switzerland-based obesity biotech raising $110M total ($30M Series A led by Versant Ventures plus AstraZeneca's deal), in exchange for an acquisition option once the company reaches its first IND filing. SixPeaks is developing an activin IIA/B receptor antibody designed to produce weight loss while preserving skeletal muscle mass -- a key weakness of current market leaders like Novo Nordisk's Wegovy and Eli Lilly's Zepbound -- with preclinical mouse data showing best-in-class monotherapy efficacy.
